title: settings
textSizeUnavailable: text size adjustment unavailable on short screens
categoryCannotDelete: cannot delete — category is in use
persistNotice: allow persistent storage so the browser never silently clears your data.
icsNote: .ics import supports all-day events only. Timed events are skipped — the import dialog shows a count of how many were omitted.
activityLogNote: press {{key}} to open at any time
